'''Rett II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rettna system/Legends|Rettna system]], and was the site of a [[Jante]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony. It was attacked and captured by the Jante's sector neighbors, the [[Freda]]. During the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], the decades-old feud between [[Jante]] and [[Freda]] erupted into full-scale war as each sabotaged the other's mining operations. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces were called in to put an end to the hostilities.

{{Planet-stub}}
